2. When the function of item 1 above is enabled, the robot does not allow the mold
closing action signal (this is the hardware input signal). If it does not work, this alarm will be
triggered.
Solution: The robot does not allow the mold closing action signal. This is hardware IN point
signal. If it cannot operate normally, please check whether the relevant hardware equipment
is normal (such as power distribution, wiring, terminal joints, or A/B type)
310512

Exceeded entire cycle limit time
152

 Operation Manual

Cause: The time spent in the whole production process of a single mold shot exceeds (entire
cycle limit time)
Solution: Please adjust the appropriate entire cycle limit time (parameter R (32400) limit
time) to avoid incorrect alarm activation
310544

Finished products do not dropped

Cause: When the finished product falling detection function is enabled (parameter R (32602)
falls detection signal is used), if the electric signal does not act within the period interval, this
alarm will act
Solution: 1. Electric signal: This is the hardware input point signal. If it cannot operate
normally, please check if the relevant hardware equipment is functioning properly (such as
power distribution, wiring, terminal joints, or A/B type)
2. Please adjust the appropriate cycle interval time to avoid the alarm
malfunctioning when the electric signal is not activated.
310576

Reached number of good products

Cause: At the end of the production of each mold shot, the required number of good
products will be checked. If the number of good products has reached the set value, this
alarm will be activated
Solution: 1. The setting parameter of demands for good products is R (32402)
2. If item 1 above is not set properly, it may affect production. Please set the
required quantity of good products according to actual production needs
310577

The number of continuous defective products exceeds the limit

Cause: At the end of the production of each mold shot, the number of continuous defective
products will be checked. If the number of continuous defective products reaches the set
value, this alarm will be activated.
Solution: 1. The setting parameter of continuous defective products is R (32402)
2. If item 1 above is not set properly, it may affect production. Please set
appropriate limit values according to actual production needs.
310578

Full automatic is prohibited

Cause: Used to restrict the use of fully automatic production mode, even if switched to
automatic mode, it will return to manual mode after the production of that mode is
completed and provide an alarm prompt.
Solution: The setting parameter for prohibiting full-automatic production is R (32662)
310579

The left and right start buttons exceed the interval difference time

Cause: 1. In manual mode, the simultaneous pressing left and right start buttons will execute
the mold closing process (including high-pressure clamping). To avoid operator carelessness,
it is required to press the left and right start buttons separately with both hands at the same
153

 Operation Manual

time.
2: The left and right start buttons in production mode vary according to the
movement stroke of the machine (i.e. when the mold moving function is not included (or not
used)), To avoid operator carelessness, it is required to press the left and right start buttons
separately with both hands at the same time.
Solution: 1. To execute any operation of pressing the left and right start buttons, please press
them with both hands at the same time.
2. If still fails to operate normally when follow by item 1 above, please adjust the
interval gap time according to the appropriate time value (the interval gap time of the start
button around the parameter R (32680))
Note: This alarm normally happens in vertical machine version

310736

PLC Alarms

Cause: When the alarm source is from PLC, it is used to indicate the alarm source (currently
IN1xxx series does not have PLC function).
Solution: Confirm the reson that trigger the alarm in the ladder diagram and handle them
accordingly.

6. OP Warning
320000

Please adjust the injection ruler to zero first

Cause: When using an optical or magnetic ruler for injection ruler, it is used to indicate the
items that need to be executed before switching to production mode or any screw action.
(This warning does not include all control machines)
Solution: Adjust the injection ruler to zero in the mold adjustment mode.
320001

Zero calibration of injecting ruler completed

Cause: Warning message when the zero calibration of injecting is completed.
Solution: Reset after confirmation.
320320

Automatic temperature adjustment completed

Cause: Warning message when the automatic temperature adjustment is completed.
Solution: Reset after confirmation.
320321

Automatic temperature adjustment in progress

Cause: After confirmation, please do not reset to avoid the temperature adjustment being
aborted (this mechanism varies with different software versions).
320322

Temperature increase completed

154

 Operation Manual

Cause: When the temperature of each section reaches the target temperature range, it is
used to remind operators that they can perform production operations (this mechanism
varies with different software versions).
Solution: Reset after confirmation.
320416

Mold adjustment completed

Cause: Warning message when the mold adjustment is completed in the mold adjustment
mode.
Solution: Reset after confirmation.
320417

Mold adjustment reached limit

Cause: Safety protection when performing mold adjustment forward/backward in mold
adjustment mode, and the proximity switch of the limit for mold adjustment
forward/backward has been triggered
Solution: 1. Reset after confirmation.
2. Mold adjustment forward limit or mold adjustment backward limit. This is the
hardware input point signal. If it cannot operate normally, please check whether the relevant
hardware equipment is normal (such as power distribution, wiring, terminal joints, or A/B
type)
320576

Remaining demands for good products have reached

Cause: 1. The remaining demand for good products in this batch=demand for each packaging
batch - number of current good products in this batch
2. When the 'demand for this batch of remaining good products' is less than or equal
to the 'packaging batch remaining quantity', this warning message will be activated
Solution: Reset after confirmation.
7. Human Machine Alarms
210000

Parameter definition file error

Cause: There is an issue with the parameter definition file or file structure, which prevents
the smooth reading of file data.
Solution: Replace with a new CF card
210002

No parameter definition file

Cause: Cannot find any parameter definition files in the system.
Solution: Replace with a new CF card
210003

Unable to open print format file

Cause: Cannot find the print format file in PC program.
Solution: Please reinstall the PC program.

155

 Operation Manual

210004

DI repeated mapping

Cause: Different DI numbers are set to the same hardware contact.
Solution: Please reset the hardware contacts corresponding to DI.
210005

DO Duplicate Mapping

Cause: Different DO numbers are set to the same hardware contact.
Solution: Please reset the hardware contacts corresponding to DO.
210006

Unable to load string file

Cause: Cannot find the language string file selected by the user in the system.
Solution: Replace with a new CF card

8. Human Machine Warnings
220000

Setting records cannot to be saved, it is recommended to restart

Cause: The file system is abnormal, resulting in failure to save the setting records.
Solution: If it still doesn’t work after restart, replace with a new CF card.
220001

Abnormal records cannot be saved, it is recommended to restart

Cause: The file system is abnormal, resulting in failure to save exception records.
Solution: If it still doesn’t work after restart, replace with a new CF card.
220002

Setting permissions cannot be saved, it is recommended to restart

Cause: The file system is abnormal, resulting in failure to save the setting permissions.
Solution: If it still doesn’t work after restart, replace with a new CF card.
220003

Upgrade failed!! The inspection file does not exist

Cause: Cannot find the inspection file while upgrading the program.
Solution: Please confirm the integrity of the upgrade file and check whether there is any
missing file.
220004

Upgrade failed!! Upgrade file damage

Cause: When upgrading the program, the system detected that the file was damaged.
Solution: Please confirm the integrity of the upgraded file and whether the file has been
damaged.
220005

Maintenance required

Cause: The maintenance items set by the user have reached maintenance required stage.
Solution: Please maintain the items that need maintenance and go to the maintenance page
to set the maintenance completion.
